column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text el_class=”medium-p”]

Comprehensive Dentistry in Greer, SC

As a trusted dentist who has been in the Greer community for decades, your smile will be in good hands at Poinsett Dental Associates. Our experienced dentists and team offer a range of dental services, including dental exams and cleanings, dentistry for kids, dental implants, cosmetic dentistry, TMJ/TMD treatment, crowns and bridgework, and more. Our comfortable office is equipped with the latest technology to ensure every procedure is precise, effective and efficient.
